sentences.translation: Grad je otvorio centar za učenje jezika.
sentences.translationEn: The city opened a language learning center.

sentences.translation: Centar podučava arapski, engleski i francuski.
sentences.translationEn: The center teaches Arabic, English, and French.

sentences.arabic: سَجَّلَ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ فِي الدَّوْرَاتِ الدِّرَاسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi mladi su se prijavili na kurseve.
sentences.translationEn: Many young people enrolled in the study courses.

sentences.arabic: الرُّسُومُ مَعْقُولَةٌ وَالدُّرُوسُ فِي الصَّبَاحِ وَالْمَسَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Naknade su razumne i nastava je ujutro i navečer.
sentences.translationEn: The fees are reasonable and classes are in the morning and evening.
